headline: Flowserve Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: FLS heads into Q1 earnings with solid demand across pumps and flow control, but rising costs and FX headwinds may weigh on margins.

headline: Illinois Tool Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: ITW heads into Q1 results with steady estimates and strong segment demand, but currency headwinds and construction weakness could temper gains.

headline: Ahead of Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Q1 Earnings: Get Ready With Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Illinois Tool Works (ITW), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.
